Execution rhythm

Newsletter and content workflow

The static site can display articles now, while the future WordPress export can make publishing editable by the client.

  1. 01Draft in English
  2. 02Generate language versions
  3. 03Review and approve
  4. 04Publish newest first
  5. 05Distribute on LinkedIn
